creator: nigoro.dev@gmail.com
text:
https://www.freebsd.org/security/advisories/FreeBSD-EN-16:06.libc.asc

> a) Download the relevant patch from the location below, and verify the
> detached PGP signature using your PGP utility.

> [FreeBSD 10.3]
> # fetch https://security.FreeBSD.org/patches/EN-16:06/libc.patch
> # fetch https://security.FreeBSD.org/patches/EN-16:06/libc.patch.asc
> # gpg --verify libc.patch.asc

# fetch https://security.FreeBSD.org/patches/EN-16:06/libc.patch
fetch: https://security.FreeBSD.org/patches/EN-16:06/libc.patch: Not Found
# fetch https://security.FreeBSD.org/patches/EN-16:06/libc.patch.asc
fetch: https://security.FreeBSD.org/patches/EN-16:06/libc.patch.asc: Not Found

Please upload the patch.
